events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV celebrates 45 years
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcasted music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Today marks 45 years since it launched, forever changing the music landscape.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Mad for it!
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe', an album that defined a generation. What's your top track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year, having been born in 1935.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago. His music lives on.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot and killed in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996. He would have been 55 this year, born in 1971.

angles.name: Legendary Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music and culture.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 this year, having been born in 1942.

angles.name: Forever Iconic
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Crossing the Road
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous of all time!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that undeniable rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK on October 24, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple iPod's 25th anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it began shipping on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple's first iPod put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed how we listen to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, of course) to 64 years of 007. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles songwriter and peace activist, John Lennon, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy legend.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Turns
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles gave us the 'White Album'. A sprawling masterpiece that proved their genius. What's your hidden gem from the tracklist?
